landing.heroDescription: Create customizable events, share booking links, and let attendees find the perfect time slots on your calendar. Fast, secure, and fully automated.

mockup.timezoneSync: Automatically synced with your time zones to avoid overlaps.

calendar.title: Flexible Calendar Availability
calendar.description: Customize daily time slots, active hours, and exception dates.

timezone.title: Instant Timezone Calculations
timezone.description: Never double-book or confuse zone differences with international guests.

booking.title: Automated Booking Links
booking.description: Send links to schedule meetings. We take care of confirmation emails.

events.title: Your Events
events.description: Manage your meeting templates, active schedules, and shareable booking links.
events.noSelection: {count, plural, one {# event total} other {# events total}}
events.bulkDeleteDescription: This will permanently delete {count, plural, one {# event} other {# events}}. This action cannot be undone, and guests will no longer be able to schedule slots for them.
events.bulkDeleteSuccess: {count, plural, one {# event deleted} other {# events deleted}} successfully.

empty.title: No events created yet
empty.description: Get started by creating your first event template. Once active, clients will be able to schedule slots directly.

eventForm.nameDescription: The title attendees will see when booking this meeting.
eventForm.durationDescription: The length of the booked time slot.
eventForm.descriptionPlaceholder: Write a brief overview of what this meeting is about...
eventForm.descriptionDescription: Optional instructions or notes for the guest.
eventForm.activeDescription: When active, guests can book slots using your public link.
eventForm.deleteDescription: This action is permanent and cannot be undone. Guests will no longer be able to schedule slots for this event template.
eventForm.deleteSuccessMessage: The event has been successfully deleted from your schedule.

schedule.title: Schedule
schedule.errorMessage: There was an error saving your schedule

booking.welcomeMessage: Welcome to my scheduling page. Please follow the instructions to add an event to my calendar.
booking.noTimeSlots: {userName} is currently booked up. Please check back later or choose a shorter event.
booking.successMessage: You should receive an email confirmation shortly. You can safely close this page now.

meetingForm.errorMessage: There was an error saving your event
